title: Qlog Main Schema Parity Refresh
summary: Bring the local main-schema requirements closer to the official qlog draft guidance without overstating implementation status.
planned_changes: Add requirement-home coverage for behavior already present in the retained model, serializers, importer, QUIC raw-info helpers, the reusable qlog event-schema metadata catalogs, and the explicit capture-start gate; implement QLOGDIR-compatible generation in the file sinks for relative file names, with QLOGFILE as a fallback; and refresh provenance when the repository chooses a new pinned draft snapshot.
out_of_scope: Adding viewer or analysis UI tooling.
Reading process environment variables from low-level serializer entry points.
Claiming operator access-control, retention, or encryption policy as a library-only behavior.
verification_plan: Run SpecTrace validation, run the requirement-home coverage audit, run the existing qlog test projects, and keep skipped requirement-home tests only for requirements whose production surface is intentionally still planned.
